title: Jellyfish Stings Got You Down? 11 Herbal Creams for Surfers
description: Cinchona officinalis creams are a popular remedy for jellyfish stings due to the presence of quinine, a key constituent that helps to neutralize the venom. Quinine has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it effective in reducing the severity of the sting. The cream also contains other compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides, which contribute to its soothing and antiseptic properties.
